message:
perf(extras): wire set_fast into mermaid, charts, and canvas rendering (bd-386kl)

Replace 119 buf.set() calls with buf.set_fast() across ftui-extras:
- mermaid_render.rs: 93 calls (node/edge/legend/axis rendering)
- mermaid_minimap.rs: 10 calls (minimap border/background)
- mermaid_diff.rs: 8 calls (diff marker rendering)
- charts.rs: 7 calls (bar/label/axis rendering)
- canvas.rs: 1 call (braille/block cell output)

export.rs left unchanged — its 15 buf.set() calls are all in test code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
